text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Traceeeeen, AcadeeeeemyпЉБпЉБ Cheer-Leading-SquadпЉБпЉБ

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Members
text_block_list.text: OsuuuпЉБпЉБ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We, the Tracen Academy Cheer Squad wereгГЉпЉБ Formed for the sake of 
the upcoming Spring Fan Appreciation FestivalгГЉпЉБ

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Members
text_block_list.text: OsuuuпЉБпЉБ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For all the Uma Musume participating in eventsгГЉпЉБ We will 
vigorously cheer, so they can perform at their peakгГЉпЉБпЉБ

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Members
text_block_list.text: OsuuuпЉБпЉБ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: For that endгГЉ We willгГЉпЉБпЉБ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Bring in the Hyper Power DX Cheer GearпЉБ Just by 
wearing it, it can help support deep breathingпЉБ 
Moreover, it comes with a built-in micпЉБпЉБ

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶Eh, EeeeeeeeehпЉБпЉЯ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ooohoohoo, it was a nice surprise, wasn't itпЉЯ Keeping it a secret 
from even the rest of the squad was well worth itпЉБпЉБ

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Keeping it a secret means I had no way to stop youпЉБ I mean, what 
the heck are you making Pearl-neesan doпЉБпЉЯ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's no different from fireworks or a disco ballпЉБ Glitzy things 
help lighten the moodпЉБ And, isn't there a sense of romance to itпЉЯ 
That's why, Pearl-senpaiвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: FiiiiIIпљЮпљЮ Iiight OooOOooпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ Oon.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I have no idea what you're even talking aboutвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Stoooooop right thereпЉБ King HaloпЉБпЉБ So the one messing with the 
school's loudspeakers without permission was youпЉБпЉЯ

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The Disciplinary Committee's been getting complaintsпЉБпЉБ Just when 
I thought the speakers suddenly stopped working, a weird song 
startedвА¶вА¶ huh, what the heck is thiiiiiisпЉБпЉЯ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Geh, to think the Disciplinary Committee would figure it out so quicklyвА¶вА¶ 
EveryoneгГЉ, fall back for nooooгГЉгГЉгГЉwпЉБпЉБ RetreatпљЮпљЮпЉБпЉБ

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
HaaпљЮaaвА¶вА¶ geez, what the heck is up with 
these peopleвА¶вА¶ I can't even keep upвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
вАХвАХWell, as you just heard, the Tracen Academy Cheering Squad is a 
group put together for the гАОSpring Fan Appreciation FestivalгАП.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, the гАОFan Appreciation FestivalгАП is held in the Spring 
and Fall, and to put it simply, spring is a "Sports Meet" and 
fall is a "Cultural Festival".

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
In regards to the Spring Fan Appreciation Festival, all around 
the campus, Uma Musume will participate in all kinds of sports 
events and festivities, for the entertainment of the fans.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And so, this year, the leader of the Cheer Squad, the one taking 
charge of raising the excitement at each of the competitions, is King. 
Besides that, Pearl-san and me are part of the group, too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: вАХвАХIsn't that right, Pearl-san?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's rightпЉБ As expected of Nature. You summed up everything 
that's happened 'til nowпЉБ

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
In that case, Pearl-san can you stop going with the flow so muchвА¶вА¶пЉЯ 
King is the type of girl to let things like this go 
straight to her head after allвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh, whyпЉЯ That girl's ideas weren't bad 
at all. Besides, her way of thoughtвАХвАХ

(Ding DingпЉБ Beep BeepпЉБпЉБ Boom, Pi Pi Pii-пЉБпЉБ 
Pow PowпЉБ Pi Pii-пЉБ Boom Shakalaka Boom BoomпЉБ)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
пљЮпљЮпЉБпЉЯ W-what the heck is that musicвА¶вА¶пЉЯ 
Don't tell me, this is alsoвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: вАХвАХвАХвАХпЉБ

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: AahгГЉвА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: W-what the heck is thisпЉБпЉЯ Who's making this racketгГЉпЉБпЉЯ

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This week, the plan is to have people from outside the academy 
come and join the "Cheerleading Squad Practice Session". I know 
that they're really motivated butгГЉвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That gaudy costume and musicвА¶вА¶ and last time they 
made a giant firecrackerвА¶вА¶ HaaaпљЮпљЮ why are the leaders 
always doing something flashyвА¶вА¶пЉЯ

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
вА¶вА¶If I ask her what she's thinking, she doesn't seem like the 
type to tell me honestly.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Nature, do you want to know the answerпЉБпЉЯ

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uu-uwaaaaaahпЉБпЉЯ Pearl-sanпЉБпЉЯ M-my heart almost stoppedвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I just thought I heard the voice of someone who seemed a 
little lost. My body was moving before I knew it.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, getting back to King, it all started about a month ago. 
At least, based on what I know.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That day when the academy handed out the 
sign-up sheets for the events, KingвАХвАХ
